summary: Split out from MPI-217 (wrongly logged there). New Model Library tile (MpiModelManager, MPI-215 rewrite) has 2 progress-render bugs found while installing Chroma.

Fixed both in _tileState (MpiModelManager.js): (1) 101% overshoot -> pct now Math.min(round(progress*100),100) on live-job + partial paths (job.progress can exceed 1.0 on mixed on-disk+download install). (2) Verifying stage -> renders indeterminate 'Verifying…' sweep when st.job.phase==='verifying' (phase IS emitted by downloadManager 329/1129 + in refresh sig 979, just never rendered by lean tile). Added .mpi-tile__prog--indeterminate keyframes to MpiModelManager.css. eslint clean. LOGIC-VERIFIED, needs live re-confirm on next install.
